# Training — Teaching the Model {#sec-ch13-training}

@sec-ch12-loss gave us a loss: a single number measuring how wrong the model is.
But knowing _how wrong_ we are is only half the battle.
We also need to know _which weights_ are responsible for the error, and _by how much to change each one_.

That is the job of *training*.

{{< include book/13-training/sections/idea.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-training/sections/chain-rule.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-training/sections/linear-backward.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-training/sections/update.qmd >}}

{{< include book/13-training/sections/takeaways.qmd >}}
